stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What is correct concerning the limit masses in the section 3 of the attached load sheet?

options.a: The actual ZFM, actual TOM or actual LM could exceptionally exceed the respective limit mass.
options.b: The actual ZFM, TOM and LM must be lower or equal to the respective limit mass.
options.c: The maximum LM boxes should be recorded with the MLM plus Trip Fuel.
options.d: The maximum LM boxes should be recorded with the regulated TOM.
